fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: A single Card spans the full width. Use a Cards grid for a side-by-side layout.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Body content
fields.description: Optional rich content shown under the title

fields.name: title
fields.label: Title
fields.description: A single Card spans the full width. Use a Cards grid for a side-by-side layout.

fields.name: children
fields.label: Body content
fields.description: Optional rich content shown under the title

fields.name: items
fields.label: Tab labels (must match each Tab's label below, in order)
fields.description: One entry per tab, in order. Each must match the "Label" of the matching Tab block below — the labels here drive the tab buttons; the Tab blocks hold the content.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Open behaviour
fields.description: How many panels can be open at once. Does NOT limit how many items you can add.

options.label: One at a time (opening one closes others)

fields.name: id
fields.label: Make dismissable (memory key)
fields.description: Provide a short, STABLE id (e.g. "summer-sale-2026") to show a dismiss button and remember the choice per visitor. Leave empty for a non-dismissable banner. Keep it the same once published — changing it makes a dismissed banner reappear.

fields.name: className
fields.label: Custom CSS classes (advanced)
fields.description: Tailwind/CSS classes for custom colors, e.g. "bg-purple-600 text-white".

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Sidebar order. Keep "..." (= all other pages) or new docs vanish from the sidebar. Tokens: "slug"=page/folder · "..."=everything else (keep last) · "---Label---"=separator · "[Text](url)"=link · "!slug"=hide

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
